stemHtml: What is the planning minima for the ETOPS en route alternate aerodrome?

options.a: Precision approach DA/H + 200 ft; RVR/VIS + 800 m
options.b: Precision approach DA/H + 400 ft; RVR/VIS + 1500 m
options.c: Non-precision approach or circling approach: MDA/H + 400 ft; RVR/VIS + 800 m
options.d: Non-precision approach or circling approach: MDA/H + 300 ft; RVR/VIS + 1000 m
